headline: Why Monday, April 13 Begins A Critical Week For The Stock Market Rally
summary: Monday begins a critical week for the stock market for several reasons.  First, Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan report quarterly results early in the week, the traditional start of the first-quarter earnings season.  Lastly, on the technical side, the stock market's powerful jump on Wednesday launched new rally.

Lastly, on the technical side, the stock market's powerful jump on Wednesday launched new rally.

headline: Wary Investors Eye Another Escalation in Iran War
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The prospect that the Iran war will reintensify after the failure of peace talks threatens to spark fresh volatility across global markets, after a week that saw a fragile ceasefire drive stocks up and oil down by the most this year.After the US and Iran were unable to reach a deal in negotiations over the weekend, President Donald Trump said the US will blockade the Strait of Hormuz. He posted on social media that “Any Iranian who fires at us, or at peaceful vessels, will be BLOW
